description_long: This is a classic, propeller-driven airplane with a streamlined fuselage painted primarily in blue and white, featuring a distinct stripe and insignia along the side. The aircraft has a low-wing configuration with straight wings that extend horizontally from the fuselage, accented by blue paint on the upper surfaces. It is equipped with two piston engines mounted on the wings, each with a visible propeller. The tail section features a conventional design with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, both accented with blue tips and a striped rudder. The cockpit is located at the forward end of the fuselage, with windows suggesting an enclosed, multi-seat arrangement. The landing gear is not visible, suggesting it may be retractable or not modeled in the current view.
description: A blue and white, twin-propeller airplane with a low-wing, streamlined fuselage and conventional tail. Features include a forward enclosed cockpit and classic aviation markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue and white fuselage, cockpit windows, and both engines with propellers clearly visible.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the full wingspan, engine placement, and the blue pattern on the wings and fuselage.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the other side of the fuselage and tail details.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the twin propellers, nose, and the symmetrical wing and engine arrangement.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight configuration with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin piston engines mounted on the wings, each with a visible propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Landing gear not visible; likely retractable or not modeled.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows, suggesting a multi-seat configuration.
